item.title: Unexpected Car Mix-Up
item.description: A confusing situation involving the wrong vehicle leads to misunderstandings and an unexpected outcome. How did the mix-up even happen?

media:content.media:title: Unexpected Car Mix-Up
media:content.media:description: A confusing situation involving the wrong vehicle leads to misunderstandings and an unexpected outcome. How did the mix-up even happen?

item.title: The Reality Behind Affordable Cars
item.description: Car prices continue to rise as financing costs, inventory changes, and vehicle features reshape the market. This breakdown explores what’s making affordable cars harder to find, how buyers can compare real value, and what to watch for before purchasing. Are budget-friendly vehicles disappearing for good?

media:content.media:title: The Reality Behind Affordable Cars
media:content.media:description: Car prices continue to rise as financing costs, inventory changes, and vehicle features reshape the market. This breakdown explores what’s making affordable cars harder to find, how buyers can compare real value, and what to watch for before purchasing. Are budget-friendly vehicles disappearing for good?

item.title: Breaking Down the Gas Price Spike
item.description: Rising fuel prices are discussed from a dealership and driver perspective, including how they impact buying habits and vehicle demand. What’s driving the sudden increase?

media:content.media:title: Breaking Down the Gas Price Spike
media:content.media:description: Rising fuel prices are discussed from a dealership and driver perspective, including how they impact buying habits and vehicle demand. What’s driving the sudden increase?

item.title: Used cars to think twice about
item.description: Certain used vehicles may come with reliability concerns, expensive repairs, or ownership headaches worth considering before buying. Which models raise the biggest red flags?

item.title: 5 car-buying moves
item.description: Helpful strategies for negotiating, financing, and getting better value during the car-buying process. Which move saves buyers the most money?

item.title: Corvette icicle moments
item.description: Cold weather creates an unusual and funny moment involving a Corvette and a massive icicle. How did it even end up like this?

item.title: 5 Dealership Mistakes to Avoid
item.description: Common dealership mistakes are broken down to help car buyers avoid costly misunderstandings during the buying process. Which mistake catches most people off guard?

item.title: Why Windshield Repairs Are Expensive
item.description: An explanation of why windshield repair or replacement can cost more than expected, including materials, sensors, and labor. What drives up the price?
